title: Sulfur Sport Balls
description: Sulfur Sport Balls is a resource pack that turns blocks used by the Sulfur Cube mob into sports balls.
body:
![poster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YKo02V9D/images/e7bc5a76aaf5eb08addb7f86ebfa203e12c7f9e4.png)

Sulfur Sport Balls is a resource pack that transforms blocks used by the Sulfur Cube into sports balls and physics-based objects.

Each block type represents a different behavior.

The pack has been fully updated for the latest Sulfur Cube physics changes.
Currently available:

| Block | Ball |
|:-----:|:----:|
| Concrete Powder | Pool Ball Set |
|Stripped Pale Oak Wood|Volleyball|
|Dried Kelp Block|Football|
|Bamboo Mosaic|Basketball|

More ball types and variations coming soon.
